cleavage agent: digested with trypsin before mass spectrometric analysis
collision energy: with higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD) at a resolution of 17,500 at 200 m/z. Other instrument parameters were set as follows: 27% normalized collision energy (NCE)
fragmentation method: followed by top 15 data-dependent MS/MS scans with higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: The proteome analysis was performed on an Orbitrap Q-Exactive HF (Thermo Fisher Scientific)
